scored_papers.title: Constraining the Potential Index n of the Early Dark Energy Model Using Cosmic Birefringence from Planck and ACT
scored_papers.abstract: EDE potential V ∝ [1-cos(φ/f)]^n で cosmic birefringence + Hubble 緊張を同時説明、Planck + ACT で n の依存性を系統解析。
scored_papers.reason: 🌌 cosmic birefringence + Hubble 緊張を 1 つの EDE potential で! Planck + ACT で n 依存性を初の系統解析 ✨
scored_papers.summary: V ∝ [1-cos(φ/f)]^n EDE + Chern-Simons coupling、n=2,3,4 で MCMC fit、観測 prefer の n 領域を抽出 📊

scored_papers.title: The XRISM measurements of the black-hole spin in Cyg X-1 are highly model-dependent
scored_papers.abstract: XRISM Resolve + NICER + NuSTAR で Cyg X-1 spin 測定、relxill だと a* = 0.99 だが relxillCp/reflkerrD だと a* = 0、モデル依存性が深刻。
scored_papers.reason: ⚡ XRISM Resolve で Cyg X-1 spin を測定 → relxill だと a*≈0.99、Comptonization 込みだと a*=0! モデル依存性が深刻 🔍
scored_papers.summary: XRISM + NICER + NuSTAR 同時解析、reflection model の選択で BH spin が 0.99 → 0 まで動く。spin 推定の系統不定性 📡

scored_papers.title: Polarized Anisotropic Stochastic Gravitational Wave Background Search with Ground-Based Detector Networks
scored_papers.abstract: CMB polarimetry 流の Stokes (I,V,Q,U) decomposition で SGW background を LVK O3 で解析、polarized angular spectra を制約。
scored_papers.reason: 🛰 CMB polarimetry 流の Stokes (I,V,Q,U) decomposition で SGW background を解析! 地上検出器版 polarized GW map ✨
scored_papers.summary: 全 Stokes 最尤 map-making を LVK O3 に適用、C_ℓ^VV/EE/BB を制約、intensity-only からの差を評価 📊
